```
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from "vue";
import { useActivityModal } from "../../composables/useActivityModal";
import { renderMath } from "../../composables/useMathRenderer";
import {
    PhX,
    PhCheckCircle,
    PhWarningCircle,
    PhArrowRight,
    PhArrowsCounterClockwise,
    PhTrophy,
    PhCornersOut,
    PhBookOpen,
    PhStar,
    PhMedal,
} from "@phosphor-icons/vue";

const props = defineProps({
    isOpen: Boolean,
    title: { type: String, default: "TheoryQuest" },
    fullscreen: { type: Boolean, default: true },
});
const emit = defineEmits(["close", "complete"]);
const { shouldPulse, modalRoot } = useActivityModal(props, emit);
const titleId = `tq-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;

const chapter = ref(0);
const choice = ref("");
const feedback = ref("");
const feedbackType = ref("");
const done = ref(false);

const chapters = [
    {
        badge: "Level 1",
        title: "De wet van Archimedes",
        exercise: "Maak oefening 1 en 2 in je cursus (p. 16).",
        commentary:
            "De archimedeskracht is de opwaartse kracht die een voorwerp ondervindt in een vloeistof of gas. De grootte hangt af van drie factoren: de dichtheid van het fluïdum \\( \\rho_{vl} \\), de zwaarteveldsterkte \\( g \\), en het ondergedompelde volume \\( V_{vwp} \\). Schrijf de wet in woorden én in formulevorm op in je cursus.",
        formula: "\\( F_A = \\rho_{vl} \\cdot g \\cdot V_{vwp} \\)",
        q: "Van welke drie factoren hangt de archimedeskracht af?",
        opts: [
            {
                v: "ok",
                t: "\\( \\rho_{vl} \\), \\( g \\), en \\( V_{vwp} \\)",
            },
            { v: "no1", t: "Materiaal, massa, en vorm" },
            { v: "no2", t: "Diepte, temperatuur, en volume" },
        ],
        ok: "ok",
        note: "Juist! De formule is \\( F_A = \\rho_{vl} \\cdot g \\cdot V_{vwp} \\). Het materiaal van het voorwerp zelf doet er niet toe — een blokje lood en een blokje kurk met hetzelfde volume krijgen exact dezelfde \\( F_A \\)!",
        scene: "formula",
    },
    {
        badge: "Level 2",
        title: "Waar komt F_A vandaan?",
        exercise: "Maak oefening 3 in je cursus (p. 16-17).",
        commentary:
            "Hydrostatische druk neemt toe met de diepte: \\( p = \\rho_{vl} \\cdot g \\cdot h \\). Het ondervlak van een voorwerp zit dieper dan het bovenvlak, dus de druk onderaan is groter. Het drukverschil × oppervlak = de archimedeskracht. Daarom is \\( F_A \\) gelijk aan het gewicht van de verplaatste vloeistof.",
        formula: "\\( p = \\rho_{vl} \\cdot g \\cdot h \\)",
        q: "Je hangt een blokje aan een touw en laat het in water zakken. De balans onder het water geeft een uitslag. Wat meet die uitslag?",
        opts: [
            {
                v: "ok",
                t: "Het volume van het blokje (de balans geeft \\( \\rho \\cdot V \\) — met \\( \\rho \\) bekend vinden we \\( V \\))",
            },
            { v: "no1", t: "De massa van het blokje" },
            {
                v: "no2",
                t: "Het gewicht van het blokje in lucht",
            },
        ],
        ok: "ok",
        note: "Precies! De weegschaal geeft de archimedeskracht als massa: \\( \\rho_{water} \\cdot V \\). Omdat je de dichtheid van water kent, weet je meteen het volume van het blokje. De diepte waarop je het blokje hangt maakt niet uit!",
        scene: "pressure",
    },
    {
        badge: "Level 3",
        title: "Zinken, zweven, stijgen, drijven",
        exercise: "Maak oefening 5, 6 en 13 in je cursus (p. 18-21).",
        commentary:
            "Of een voorwerp zinkt, zweeft, stijgt of drijft hangt volledig af van de vergelijking tussen \\( F_z \\) en \\( F_A \\), en dus tussen \\( \\rho_{vwp} \\) en \\( \\rho_{vl} \\). Let op: de diepte in de vloeistof heeft GEEN invloed op \\( F_A \\) — enkel het ondergedompelde volume telt!",
        formula: null,
        q: "Een bal stijgt op uit het water. Het deel dat boven water uitsteekt wordt steeds groter. Wat gebeurt er met de archimedeskracht?",
        opts: [
            {
                v: "ok",
                t: "\\( F_A \\) wordt kleiner (het ondergedompelde volume neemt af)",
            },
            { v: "no1", t: "\\( F_A \\) wordt groter" },
            { v: "no2", t: "\\( F_A \\) blijft constant" },
        ],
        ok: "ok",
        note: "Klopt! Wanneer de bal stijgt, komt er meer van de bal boven water → minder \\( V_{onder} \\) → \\( F_A \\) daalt. Zodra \\( F_A = F_z \\) stopt het stijgen en drijft de bal. Ook belangrijk: op 30 cm diepte of vlak onder het oppervlak — \\( F_A \\) is exact hetzelfde!",
        scene: "states",
    },
    {
        badge: "Level 4",
        title: "Krachten in beeld",
        exercise:
            "Maak oefening 9, 10, 11 en 12 in je cursus (p. 19-20).",
        commentary:
            "Bij elk van de vier bewegingstoestanden horen krachtenpijlen in de juiste verhouding. Teken \\( F_z \\) altijd naar beneden (rode pijl) en \\( F_A \\) altijd naar boven (groene pijl). De lengte van de pijl toont de grootte van de kracht. Bij drijven: \\( F_z = F_A \\) → even lange pijlen!",
        formula: null,
        q: "Een voorwerp drijft op water. Welke bewering over de krachtenpijlen is juist?",
        opts: [
            {
                v: "ok",
                t: "De pijlen voor \\( F_z \\) en \\( F_A \\) zijn even lang, in tegenovergestelde richting",
            },
            {
                v: "no1",
                t: "De pijl voor \\( F_A \\) is langer dan die voor \\( F_z \\)",
            },
            {
                v: "no2",
                t: "Alleen \\( F_A \\) werkt — zwaartekracht doet niet mee bij drijven",
            },
        ],
        ok: "ok",
        note: "Perfect! Bij drijven is er evenwicht: de krachten heffen elkaar exact op. Teken ze dus even lang. Onthoud: \\( F_z \\) rood naar beneden, \\( F_A \\) groen naar boven — altijd loodrecht op het wateroppervlak.",
        scene: "ball-up",
    },
    {
        badge: "Level 5",
        title: "IJsberg, kurk en gouden kroon",
        exercise: "Maak oefening 17, 18 en 19 in je cursus (p. 22).",
        commentary:
            "Bij drijven geldt: \\( \\frac{V_{onder}}{V_{vwp}} = \\frac{\\rho_{vwp}}{\\rho_{vl}} \\). Een ijsberg: \\( 0{,}92/1{,}02 \\approx 90\\% \\) onder water. Kurk: \\( 0{,}25/1{,}00 = 25\\% \\) onder, 75% boven! De gouden en zilveren kroon: gelijke massa maar verschillende dichtheid → ander volume → andere \\( F_A \\).",
        formula:
            "\\( \\frac{V_{onder}}{V_{vwp}} = \\frac{\\rho_{vwp}}{\\rho_{vl}} \\)",
        q: "Een gouden en een zilveren kroon hebben dezelfde massa. Ze hangen in evenwicht aan een balans. Wat gebeurt er als je beide in water onderdompelt?",
        opts: [
            {
                v: "ok",
                t: "De zilveren kroon stijgt (zilver: lagere \\( \\rho \\) → groter \\( V \\) → grotere \\( F_A \\))",
            },
            { v: "no1", t: "De gouden kroon stijgt" },
            {
                v: "no2",
                t: "De balans blijft in evenwicht",
            },
        ],
        ok: "ok",
        note: "Archimedes zou trots zijn! Zilver: \\( \\rho = 10\\,500 \\), goud: \\( \\rho = 19\\,300 \\). Zelfde massa maar zilver heeft lager \\( \\rho \\) → groter \\( V \\) → grotere \\( F_A \\) in water → de zilveren kant stijgt. Precies zo ontdekte Archimedes dat de kroon vals was!",
        scene: "iceberg",
    },
];

const current = computed(() => chapters[chapter.value]);

function check() {
    if (choice.value === current.value.ok) {
        feedbackType.value = "success";
        feedback.value = current.value.note;
        setTimeout(() => {
            feedback.value = "";
            feedbackType.value = "";
            choice.value = "";
            if (chapter.value < chapters.length - 1) {
                chapter.value++;
            } else {
                done.value = true;
            }
        }, 2000);
    } else {
        feedbackType.value = "error";
        feedback.value =
            "Niet helemaal — lees de uitleg nog eens en bekijk de oefening in je cursus. Probeer opnieuw!";
        setTimeout(() => {
            feedback.value = "";
            feedbackType.value = "";
            choice.value = "";
        }, 2500);
    }
}

function reset() {
    chapter.value = 0;
    choice.value = "";
    feedback.value = "";
    feedbackType.value = "";
    done.value = false;
}

const toggleFullscreen = () => {
    if (!document.fullscreenElement)
        document.documentElement.requestFullscreen().catch(() => {});
    else document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});
};
</script>

<template>
    <div
        v-if="isOpen"
        ref="modalRoot"
        class="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-0 md:p-4"
    >
        <div
            class="absolute inset-0 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl"
            @click="emit('close')"
        ></div>

        <div
            class="relative w-full h-full max-w-6xl max-h-[800px] bg-slate-900 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-none md:rounded-3xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row"
        >
            <!-- ═══════════ LEFT PANEL ═══════════ -->
            <div class="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-white overflow-hidden min-w-0">
                <!-- Header -->
                <div
                    class="bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-950 via-indigo-900 to-indigo-950 text-white px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0 border-b border-white/5"
                >
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div
                            class="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-400 to-amber-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-amber-500/20"
                        >
                            <PhTrophy
                                class="text-white text-xl"
                                weight="fill"
                            />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-black text-sm tracking-wide">
                                TheoryQuest
                            </h3>
                            <p
                                class="text-[10px] text-indigo-300/70 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest"
                            >
                                Theorie op eigen tempo
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <button
                            @click="toggleFullscreen"
                            class="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                            title="Volledig scherm"
                        >
                            <PhCornersOut class="text-lg" />
                        </button>
                        <button
                            @click="emit('close')"
                            class="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                            title="Sluiten"
                        >
                            <PhX class="text-lg" />
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Progress Dots -->
                <div class="px-6 py-3 bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-100 shrink-0">
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between max-w-xs mx-auto">
                        <div
                            v-for="(_, idx) in chapters"
                            :key="idx"
                            class="flex items-center"
                        >
                            <div
                                class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-black transition-all duration-500 shadow-sm"
                                :class="
                                    idx < chapter
                                        ? 'bg-emerald-500 text-white shadow-emerald-500/20'
                                        : idx === chapter
                                          ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white ring-2 ring-indigo-200'
                                          : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-400'
                                "
                            >
                                <PhCheckCircle
                                    v-if="idx < chapter"
                                    weight="fill"
                                    class="text-sm"
                                />
                                <span v-else>{{ idx + 1 }}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div
                                v-if="idx < chapters.length - 1"
                                class="w-8 h-0.5 transition-all duration-500"
                                :class="
                                    idx < chapter
                                        ? 'bg-emerald-400'
                                        : 'bg-slate-200'
                                "
                            ></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Scrollable Content -->
                <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 md:p-8 custom-scrollbar">
                    <Transition name="fade-slide" mode="out-in">
                        <div
                            v-if="!done"
                            :key="chapter"
                            class="space-y-5 max-w-xl mx-auto"
                        >
                            <!-- Level Badge -->
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <span
                                    class="px-3 py-1.5 bg-indigo-600 text-white text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg shadow-md shadow-indigo-600/20"
                                    >{{ current.badge }}</span
                                >
                                <span
                                    class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-bold"
                                    >{{ chapter + 1 }} / {{ chapters.length }}</span
                                >
                            </div>

                            <!-- Chapter Title -->
                            <h3
                                class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black text-slate-800 leading-tight"
                            >
                                {{ current.title }}
                            </h3>

                            <!-- Exercise Callout -->
                            <div
                                class="p-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-50 to-amber-100/50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 flex items-start gap-3 shadow-sm"
                            >
                                <div
                                    class="w-10 h-10 bg-amber-500 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 shadow-md shadow-amber-500/20"
                                >
                                    <PhBookOpen
                                        class="text-white text-lg"
                                        weight="fill"
                                    />
                                </div>
                                <p
                                    class="text-sm font-bold text-amber-900 leading-relaxed pt-1"
                                    v-html="renderMath(current.exercise)"
                                ></p>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Commentary -->
                            <div
                                class="p-5 bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 border-indigo-100 shadow-sm"
                            >
                                <p
                                    class="text-sm text-slate-600 leading-relaxed"
                                    v-html="renderMath(current.commentary)"
                                ></p>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Formula -->
                            <div
                                v-if="current.formula"
                                class="flex justify-center p-5 bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-50 to-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-100"
                            >
                                <div
                                    class="text-2xl text-indigo-900 font-serif"
                                    v-html="renderMath(current.formula)"
                                ></div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Question Section -->
                            <div
                                class="bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden"
                            >
                                <div
                                    class="px-5 py-3 bg-slate-800 text-white flex items-center gap-2"
                                >
                                    <PhMedal
                                        class="text-amber-400 text-lg"
                                        weight="fill"
                                    />
                                    <p
                                        class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest"
                                    >
                                        Check je begrip
                                    </p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-5 space-y-4">
                                    <p
                                        class="text-base font-bold text-slate-800 leading-snug"
                                        v-html="renderMath(current.q)"
                                    ></p>

                                    <div class="space-y-2.5">
                                        <button
                                            v-for="opt in current.opts"
                                            :key="opt.v"
                                            @click="
                                                choice = opt.v;
                                                feedback = '';
                                                feedbackType = '';
                                            "
                                            class="w-full text-left p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-200 flex items-start gap-3 group"
                                            :class="
                                                choice === opt.v
                                                    ? 'border-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50 shadow-md shadow-indigo-600/5'
                                                    : 'border-slate-200 bg-white hover:border-indigo-300 hover:bg-slate-50'
                                            "
                                        >
                                            <div
                                                class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 mt-0.5 transition-colors"
                                                :class="
                                                    choice === opt.v
                                                        ? 'border-indigo-600 bg-indigo-600'
                                                        : 'border-slate-300 group-hover:border-indigo-400'
                                                "
                                            >
                                                <div
                                                    v-if="choice === opt.v"
                                                    class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-white"
                                                ></div>
                                            </div>
                                            <span
                                                class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 leading-snug"
                                                v-html="renderMath(opt.t)"
                                            ></span>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Feedback -->
                            <Transition name="fade-bounce">
                                <div
                                    v-if="feedback"
                                    class="p-5 rounded-2xl border-2 flex items-start gap-4"
                                    :class="
                                        feedbackType === 'success'
                                            ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200'
                                            : 'bg-rose-50 border-rose-200'
                                    "
                                >
                                    <div
                                        class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 shadow-md"
                                        :class="
                                            feedbackType === 'success'
                                                ? 'bg-emerald-500 shadow-emerald-500/20'
                                                : 'bg-rose-500 shadow-rose-500/20'
                                        "
                                    >
                                        <component
                                            :is="
                                                feedbackType === 'success'
                                                    ? PhCheckCircle
                                                    : PhWarningCircle
                                            "
                                            class="text-xl text-white"
                                            weight="fill"
                                        />
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <p
                                            class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-1"
                                            :class="
                                                feedbackType === 'success'
                                                    ? 'text-emerald-700'
                                                    : 'text-rose-700'
                                            "
                                        >
                                            {{
                                                feedbackType === "success"
                                                    ? "Goed gedaan!"
                                                    : "Nog niet helemaal"
                                            }}
                                        </p>
                                        <p
                                            class="text-sm font-bold leading-snug"
                                            :class="
                                                feedbackType === 'success'
                                                    ? 'text-emerald-900'
                                                    : 'text-rose-900'
                                            "
                                            v-html="renderMath(feedback)"
                                        ></p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </Transition>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Completion Screen -->
                        <div
                            v-else
                            class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center py-10 space-y-6"
                        >
                            <div
                                class="w-24 h-24 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-100 to-emerald-200 rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/10"
                            >
                                <PhTrophy
                                    class="text-5xl text-emerald-600"
                                    weight="fill"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <h4
                                    class="text-3xl font-black text-slate-800"
                                >
                                    Theorie Meester!
                                </h4>
                                <p class="text-slate-500 max-w-sm leading-relaxed">
                                    Je hebt alle 5 levels doorlopen. De
                                    archimedeskracht zit nu vast — klaar voor
                                    de toets!
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-3 pt-4">
                                <button
                                    @click="reset"
                                    class="px-6 py-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-200 font-bold text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 text-sm"
                                >
                                    <PhArrowsCounterClockwise class="text-lg" />
                                    Opnieuw
                                </button>
                                <button
                                    @click="emit('complete')"
                                    class="px-8 py-3 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-indigo-700 text-white font-black text-sm shadow-lg shadow-indigo-600/20 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-indigo-600/30 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
                                >
                                    <PhStar weight="fill" class="text-lg" />
                                    Afronden
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </Transition>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer -->
                <div
                    v-if="!done"
                    class="px-6 py-4 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0"
                >
                    <span
                        class="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest"
                    >
                        Level {{ chapter + 1 }} van {{ chapters.length }}
                    </span>
                    <button
                        @click="check"
                        :disabled="!choice || !!feedback"
                        class="px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-black text-sm transition-all flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:pointer-events-none"
                        :class="
                            !choice || feedback
                                ? 'bg-slate-300 text-slate-500'
                                : feedbackType === 'success'
                                  ? 'bg-emerald-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20'
                                  : 'bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-indigo-600 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-indigo-600/20'
                        "
                    >
                        <span>Controleer</span>
                        <PhArrowRight weight="bold" class="text-lg" />
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══════════ RIGHT PANEL: Visualization ═══════════ -->
            <div
                class="hidden md:flex w-[45%] bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-indigo-950 to-slate-900 relative flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 border-l border-white/5"
            >
                <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-30 pointer-events-none">
                    <div
                        class="absolute top-10 left-10 w-48 h-48 bg-indigo-500 rounded-full blur-[100px]"
                    ></div>
                    <div
                        class="absolute bottom-10 right-10 w-48 h-48 bg-amber-500 rounded-full blur-[100px]"
                    ></div>
                </div>

                <Transition name="fade" mode="out-in">
                    <!-- ═══ SCENE: formula ═══ -->
                    <svg
                        v-if="!done"
                        :key="current.scene"
                        viewBox="0 0 400 400"
                        class="w-full max-w-[360px] h-auto drop-shadow-2xl relative z-10"
                    >
                        <!-- ── FORMULA: 3 factors → F_A ── -->
                        <g v-if="current.scene === 'formula'">
                            <!-- Water tank with ρ_vl -->
                            <rect
                                x="30"
                                y="80"
                                width="100"
                                height="140"
                                rx="8"
                                fill="rgba(56,189,248,0.15)"
                                stroke="#38bdf8"
                                stroke-width="2"
                            />
                            <path
                                d="M 30 100 L 130 100 L 130 120 Q 80 110, 30 120 Z"
                                fill="rgba(56,189,248,0.3)"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="80"
                                y="165"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="#38bdf8"
                                font-size="15"
                                font-weight="black"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                ρ
                                <tspan font-size="10" font-style="normal" dy="0"
                                    >vl</tspan
                                >
                            </text>
                            <text
                                x="80"
                                y="185"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="rgba(56,189,248,0.6)"
                                font-size="8"
                                font-weight="bold"
                            >
                                dichtheid
                            </text>

                            <!-- Gravity arrow with g -->
                            <circle
                                cx="200"
                                cy="150"
                                r="45"
                                fill="rgba(251,191,36,0.15)"
                                stroke="#fbbf24"
                                stroke-width="2"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="200"
                                y="142"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="#fbbf24"
                                font-size="22"
                                font-weight="black"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                g
                            </text>
                            <text
                                x="200"
                                y="160"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="rgba(251,191,36,0.6)"
                                font-size="8"
                                font-weight="bold"
                            >
                                9,81 N/kg
                            </text>
                            <!-- Down arrow in circle -->
                            <line
                                x1="200"
                                y1="165"
                                x2="200"
                                y2="185"
                                stroke="#fbbf24"
                                stroke-width="2"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-yellow)"
                            />

                            <!-- Submerged cube with V_vwp -->
                            <rect
                                x="270"
                                y="110"
                                width="80"
                                height="80"
                                rx="6"
                                fill="rgba(74,222,128,0.15)"
                                stroke="#4ade80"
                                stroke-width="2"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="310"
                                y="142"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="#4ade80"
                                font-size="13"
                                font-weight="black"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                V
                                <tspan font-size="9" font-style="normal" dy="0"
                                    >vwp</tspan
                                >
                            </text>
                            <text
                                x="310"
                                y="162"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="rgba(74,222,128,0.6)"
                                font-size="8"
                                font-weight="bold"
                            >
                                volume in water
                            </text>

                            <!-- Connecting lines -->
                            <line
                                x1="130"
                                y1="150"
                                x2="158"
                                y2="150"
                                stroke="white"
                                stroke-width="1"
                                stroke-dasharray="4"
                                opacity="0.3"
                            />
                            <line
                                x1="242"
                                y1="150"
                                x2="270"
                                y2="150"
                                stroke="white"
                                stroke-width="1"
                                stroke-dasharray="4"
                                opacity="0.3"
                            />

                            <!-- F_A arrow -->
                            <text
                                x="200"
                                y="290"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="white"
                                font-size="28"
                                font-weight="black"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                F
                                <tspan
                                    dy="5"
                                    font-size="16"
                                    font-style="normal"
                                >
                                    A
                                </tspan>
                            </text>
                            <text
                                x="200"
                                y="315"
                                text-anchor="middle"
                                fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)"
                                font-size="8"
                                font-weight="bold"
                            >
                                Archimedeskracht ↑
                            </text>

                            <!-- Up arrow -->
                            <line
                                x1="200"
                                y1="330"
                                x2="200"
                                y2="365"
                                stroke="#4ade80"
                                stroke-width="4"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-green)"
                            />
                        </g>

                        <!-- ── PRESSURE: cube with depth markers ── -->
                        <g v-if="current.scene === 'pressure'">
                            <!-- Water tank -->
                            <rect
                                x="50"
                                y="60"
                                width="300"
                                height="300"
                                rx="6"
                                fill="rgba(56,189,248,0.08)"
                                stroke="rgba(56,189,248,0.3)"
                                stroke-width="1.5"
                            />
                            <!-- Water surface line -->
                            <line
                                x1="50"
                                y1="100"
                                x2="350"
                                y2="100"
                                stroke="#38bdf8"
                                stroke-width="1"
                                stroke-dasharray="6"
                                opacity="0.4"
                            />

                            <!-- Cube -->
                            <rect
                                x="150"
                                y="180"
                                width="100"
                                height="100"
                                rx="4"
                                fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"
                                stroke="white"
                                stroke-width="1.5"
                            />

                            <!-- Depth h marker (surface to top of cube) -->
                            <line
                                x1="90"
                                y1="100"
                                x2="90"
                                y2="180"
                                stroke="#fbbf24"
                                stroke-width="2"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-yellow)"
                                marker-start="url(#arrow-yellow)"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="78"
                                y="145"
                                fill="#fbbf24"
                                font-size="13"
                                font-weight="bold"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                h
                            </text>

                            <!-- Depth z marker (cube height) -->
                            <line
                                x1="90"
                                y1="180"
                                x2="90"
                                y2="280"
                                stroke="#fbbf24"
                                stroke-width="2"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-yellow)"
                                marker-start="url(#arrow-yellow)"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="78"
                                y="235"
                                fill="#fbbf24"
                                font-size="13"
                                font-weight="bold"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                z
                            </text>

                            <!-- Pressure arrows on top face (small, red) -->
                            <line
                                x1="200"
                                y1="140"
                                x2="200"
                                y2="175"
                                stroke="#f87171"
                                stroke-width="3"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-red)"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="210"
                                y="162"
                                fill="#f87171"
                                font-size="9"
                                font-weight="bold"
                            >
                                p
                                <sub>boven</sub>
                            </text>

                            <!-- Pressure arrows on bottom face (large, green) -->
                            <line
                                x1="200"
                                y1="320"
                                x2="200"
                                y2="285"
                                stroke="#4ade80"
                                stroke-width="4.5"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-green)"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="210"
                                y="308"
                                fill="#4ade80"
                                font-size="9"
                                font-weight="bold"
                            >
                                p
                                <sub>onder</sub>
                            </text>

                            <!-- Net force arrow (F_A up) on the right side -->
                            <line
                                x1="320"
                                y1="310"
                                x2="320"
                                y2="130"
                                stroke="#fbbf24"
                                stroke-width="3"
                                stroke-dasharray="6,3"
                                marker-end="url(#arrow-yellow)"
                            />
                            <text
                                x="328"
                                y="225"
                                fill="#fbbf24"
                                font-size="10"
                                font-weight="black"
                                font-family="serif"
                                font-style="italic"
                            >
                                F
                                <tspan
                                    dy="2"
                                    font-size="7"
                                    font-style="normal"
                                >
                                    A
                                </tspan>
                            </text>
                        </g>

                        <!-- ── STATES: 4 columns ── -->
                        <g v-if="current.scene === 'states'">
                            <g
                                v-for="(col, i) in [
                                    { x: 30, y: 290, c: 'Zinken', f: '#f87171', arrowUp: 40, arrowDown: 60 },
                                    { x: 120, y: 220, c: 'Zweven', f: '#fbbf24', arrowUp: 50, arrowDown: 50 },
                                    { x: 210, y: 150, c: 'Stijgen', f: '#4ade80', arrowUp: 60, arrowDown: 40 },
                                    { x: 300, y: 110, c: 'Drijven', f: '#38bdf8', arrowUp: 50, arrowDown: 50 },
                                ]"
                                :key="i"
                            >
                                <!-- Water column -->
                                <rect
                                    :x="col.x"
                                    y="100"
                                    width="60"
                                    height="240"
                                    rx="5"
                                    fill="rgba(56,189,248,0.06)"
                                    stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"
                                    stroke-width="1

```
